start.speaker: Hopeful
start.text: I watched you refuse what this fair sells, not because it was ugly, but because peace was worth more. Something in me woke when I saw it. Let me walk the rest of the road with you.

choices.text: Gladly. The road has taught me I was not made to walk alone.
The way ahead is darker than the fair admits. Are you sure?

sure.speaker: Hopeful
sure.text: Dark and hard is where hope must become more than a word. I am sure.

choices.text: Then come, Hopeful. We will keep each other awake.

set_out.speaker: Hopeful
set_out.text: Lead on. When your courage runs low, I will remember aloud what we have already seen.
